name: thepipeline-site
description: ThePipeline static site. Repo root holds pages; assets/js shared scripts; scripts/ for dev.

scripts.sync-docs: mkdir -p docs/assets/js && cp assets/js/add-sport-tab.js assets/js/player-profiles-core.js docs/assets/js/ && cp index.html all-players.html team.html film-search.html pipeline.html messages.html docs/ && rm -f docs/add-sport-tab.js
